description: Local MVP authentication contract for Nebula Calligraphy before Nebula Identity is wired.

fields.username: Learner login name. MVP normalizes to lowercase and requires at least 3 characters.
fields.password: Learner password. MVP requires at least 8 characters and stores only a salted derived hash.

fields.user_id: Stable local user id used as owner_user_id for drafts, favorites, and practice records.

fields.token: Server-side session token returned after register or login.

endpoints.POST /api/v1/calligraphy/auth/register: Create a local MVP account and return a session.
endpoints.POST /api/v1/calligraphy/auth/login: Verify username/password and return a session.
endpoints.GET /api/v1/calligraphy/auth/me: Resolve the current user from Authorization: Bearer <token>.

security.ownerScopedEndpoints: Draft, favorite, practice, and learning-profile endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <token>.
security.ownerEnforcement: The effective owner is the authenticated user. Requests with mismatched owner_user_id or path owner ids are rejected with 403.
security.loginLockout: Repeated failed login attempts are temporarily locked.
security.audit: Register, login, logout, draft mutation, export, favorite mutation, and practice events should be written to the configured audit log.
